name: Wild Rice & Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Wild rice, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the vegetable stock into a soup pot.
2. Add the chopped onions, bell pepper, and parsley to the pot.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in the washed wild rice and continue simmering for another 40 minutes.
5. Add the sliced mushrooms and red wine. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cover and let it simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
7. Serve hot.
